issue_title: File browser of BigQuery service account opens twice
issue_body_preview:
When creating a BigQuery datasource, if you try to upload the service account by clicking the `Upload a service account JSON` link instead of using drag and drop, the file browser opens twice, see video.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2d6f3a16-aac7-4dc1-81ad-a95c0c5b9871
test_description_zh: 在创建 BigQuery 数据源页面，找到服务账号上传区域，点击 'Upload a service account JSON' 链接（而非使用拖拽方式），观察系统文件选择器的弹出行为。
expected_result_zh: 点击链接后，系统文件选择器应只弹出一次，而不是连续弹出两次。
